<!--
  Please fill in all sections below before submitting a PR.
  - AI-generated PRs (e.g. opened by /fix) will auto-populate some fields; manual PRs fill them in by hand.
  - Write "-" or delete the line if a field does not apply — do not leave it blank.
-->

## Change Type

- [ ] ✨ feat (new feature, produced by `/code`)
- [ ] 🐛 fix (bug fix, produced by `/fix` or manually)
- [ ] ♻️ refactor (refactor, no external behavior change)
- [ ] 📝 docs (documentation only)
- [ ] 🧪 test (tests only)
- [ ] 🔧 chore (dependencies/config)

## Related PRD / Task

<!--
  Traceability chain: PRD → task → source @prd/@task/@rules → this PR
  Required whenever business code is changed.
-->

- PRD: docs/prds/xxx.md#<feature-anchor>
- Task: docs/tasks/tasks-xxx.json#T00X
- (fix) Related issue: #xxx

## What Changed

<!-- One sentence summarizing what was done (why > what); don't repeat what the diff already shows -->

## Impact Scope

- Modules affected: `workspace/src/features/xxx/`
- API contract changes: ❌ No / ✅ Yes (if yes, describe what changed in `workspace/api-spec/openapi.json`)
- PRD business rule changes: ❌ No / ✅ Yes (if yes, which PRD, which rule, and has it been reviewed)

## Verification Checklist

<!-- Required for fix/feat PRs; may be omitted for docs-only changes -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` all green (single module + regression)
- [ ] Tests covering this change have been added (fix PRs must include a failing → fixed → green test)
- [ ] Source file JSDoc `@prd` / `@task` / `@rules` updated in sync
- [ ] `README.md` file manifests in affected directories updated in sync
- [ ] No hardcoding (see [.claude/rules/no-hardcode.md](../.claude/rules/no-hardcode.md))

## Follow-up Issues (optional)

<!--
  Issues noticed but not addressed in this PR — helps reviewers decide whether to open separate issues.
  PRs produced by the /fix command will auto-populate this section.
-->

- -
